feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to Use ZCDS or Any Standard CDS View in AMDP Table Function
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud  and trying to consume a CDS View in an AMDP Table Function.

However, I am getting the following error during activation: Please see the below Screenshots.

The object DDLS I_PRODUCTIONORDEROPCOMPONENTTP must not be used here, because it is not released for usage in AMDP methods.

Questions:

  1. How can we use a CDS View in an AMDP Table Function in Public Cloud?

  2. How can we release objects from C1 to C4?

  3. Is there any workaround, as this is urgent?

entry.title: The type "***" is not a root entity or is not released for BEHAVIOR implementation but it is
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I confirmed I_JOURNALENTRYTP is released for developer extensibility on Business Acceleraor hub.

However, when I tried it to create class on Eclipse, I got the following message.


I also wonder why I_JournalEntryTP is not displayed on Released Objects tab on Eclipse.


I would appreciate it so much if you would suggest some possible cause of this.

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud – Is it possible to add a 4th Receiver Role in Billing Document Output
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are working on Billing Document Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using BRF+ (Manage Output Determination Apps).

In Receiver determination (DT_RECEIVER), the system allows only the following standard roles for Billing Document:

  • RE (Bill-to Party)

  • AG (Sold-to Party)

  • RG (Payer)

Our business requirement is to print 4 copies of the Billing Invoice (Original, Duplicate, Triplicate, and Extra Copy).

We checked if an additional receiver role (for example, a 4th role or custom role) can be added in Output Management, but Public Cloud does not seem to support custom partner roles.

Question:

  • Is it technically possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud to add a 4th receiver role for Billing Document output determination?

  • If not, is the only supported approach to handle multiple invoice copies inside a single Adobe Form?

Any official confirmation or SAP note reference would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to find "Maintain Communication Users" or "SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR" in Cloud Shared Trial
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am currently working through a development scenario in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Shared Trial (US10). I have created a custom Communication Scenario in Eclipse (ADT) and I am now trying to set up the inbound communication.

According to the documentation, I need to use the Maintain Communication Users app to create a technical user (ZXE3_FITFOR). However, I am facing the following issues:

  • App Missing: The "Maintain Communication Users" app does not appear in my Fiori Launchpad or in the App Finder.

  • Role Missing: I cannot find the SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR role template to assign the necessary permissions to my user.

  • Restricted Access: I attempted to check the Technical Monitoring Cockpit, but it only provides read-only metrics and no user creation capabilities.

I understand that the Shared Trial is a restricted environment. Is it possible to activate the SAP_CORE_BC_COM (Communication Management) catalog in this specific trial, or is this administrative functionality completely disabled for shared users?

If this is a limitation of the Shared Trial, would moving to a BTP ABAP Environment Trial be the correct path to gain the administrator rights needed for Communication Management?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Error when extending Standard CDS view with UNION ALL
entry.content:
When I am trying to extend the CDS view 'P_ObjPgMaintOrderAndOperation' with user fields from aufk table, view  contains union; extends are not allowed. 

Kindly suggest me the options to extend.

Thanks and Regards,

Praveen

entry.title: XCO_CP_XLSX Currency/Quantity Formatting
entry.content:
Is it possible to apply Currency/Quantity/Domain(Conversion Exit) formatting, while writing to an Excel file using XCO_CP_XLSX?

PS: Not looking for this answer: Convert all fields to Strings.

Whoever has SAP S-User-ID, please vote here to have this feature included in XCO_CP_XLSX:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/364375

entry.title: How to create Business Configuration Maintenance Object / Cusomizing with header and child?
entry.content:
Hello, 

i want to create a Business configuration Maintenance Object via the adt generation wizard. Therefore i defined an header (*_status_clas & Child (*_status_code) table. 

After generation i only get the header and not the relationship to the child defined in the table.  I would expect that the generator is able to get the relationship (header-child) from the foreign key and creates the front end accordingly. 

When i tried the same for text tables it worked without any problems.

entry.title: Operations not getting created from BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE even though routing is getting generated
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am calling BAPI to create routing as shown below and passing the following data. The routing is getting created without any errors, but operations are not getting created. Can someone please suggest how this can be fixed. The same data when passed from SE37, operations are getting created.

P.S: I have already tried leading 0's in sequence, group counter, activity.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE'
      EXPORTING
        testrun                = lv_testrun
*        profile                = 'PI01'
        bomusage               = '1'
        application            = 'PP01'
      IMPORTING
        group                  = lv_group
        groupcounter           = lv_groupcounter
      TABLES
        task                   = lt_tsk
        materialtaskallocation = lt_mtk
        sequence               = lt_seq
        operation              = lt_opr
        suboperation           = lt_sbo
        referenceoperation     = lt_rfo
        workcenterreference    = lt_wcr
        componentallocation    = lt_com
        productionresource     = lt_prt
        inspcharacteristic     = lt_cha
        textallocation         = lt_txt
*       text                   = text[]
        return                 = lt_return[]
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_message          = 1
        OTHERS                 = 2.


    LOOP AT lt_return WHERE type CA 'EAX'. ENDLOOP.

    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
    ELSE.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT' EXPORTING wait = 'X'.
    ENDIF.

BAPI FieldTASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDTASK_LIST_USAGEPLANTTASK_LIST_STATUSTASK_MEASURE_UNITTASK_MEASURE_UNIT_ISOLOT_SIZE_FROMLOT_SIZE_TORESP_PLANNER_GROUPDESCRIPTIONOLD_NUMBER_OF_TASK_LISTRECALC_STD_VALUESDYN_MODIF_LEVELDYN_MODIF_RULEDYN_MODIF_BY_VENDORDYN_MODIF_BY_MANUFACTDYN_MODIF_BY_CUSTOMRSAMPLE_DRAWING_PROCEDUREIND_UNITS_EXT_NUMBERINGIDENT_KEYINSPPOINT_PARTIALLOT_ASSGNMTCHANGE_RULEOBJECT_CHANGE_TYPEPLANNING_WORK_CENTER
 500000611 20260113 99991231 1PE014KG 1999999999 SFG005 TEST             

 

 

MATERIALPLANTTASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDDOC_NUMBERITM_NUMBERWORK_BREAKDOWN_STRUCT_ELEMENTMATERIAL_EXTERNALMATERIAL_GUIDMATERIAL_VERSION
SFG05PE01500000611 20260113 99991231  0 SFG05 

 

 

TASK_LIST_GROUPGROUP_COUNTERSEQUENCE_NOCHANGE_NOVALID_FROMCHANGE_NO_TOVALID_TO_DATEDEL_INDACTIVITYOPERATION_IDCONTROL_KEYOBJ_IDOBJECT_TYPE_CIM_RESOURCEWORK_CNTRPLANTSTANDARD_TEXT_KEYDESCRIPTIONOPERATION_MEASURE_UNITOPERATION_MEASURE_UNIT_ISODENOMINATORNOMINATORBASE_QUANTITYBREAK_TIMEBREAK_UNITBREAK_UNIT_ISOACTTYPE_01STD_UNIT_01STD_UNIT_01_ISOSTD_VALUE_01ACTTYPE_02STD_UNIT_02STD_UNIT_02_ISOSTD_VALUE_02ACTTYPE_03STD_UNIT_03STD_UNIT_03_ISOSTD_VALUE_03ACTTYPE_04STD_UNIT_04STD_UNIT_04_ISOSTD_VALUE_04ACTTYPE_05STD_UNIT_05STD_UNIT_05_ISOSTD_VALUE_05ACTTYPE_06STD_UNIT_06STD_UNIT_06_ISOSTD_VALUE_06STD_VALUE_CALCULATION_TYPESTD_VALUE_YEAR_OF_CALCULATIONSTD_VALUE_CODE_REFERENCE_NOSTD_VALUE_CALCULATION_BASISNO_OF_CONFIRMATION_SLIPSNO_OF_TIME_TICKETSWAGETYPESUITABILITYNO_OF_EMPLOYEESETUP_GROUP_CATEGORYSETUP_GROUP_KEYSETUP_TYPE_KEYSCRAP_FACTORWAGEGROUPREQUIRED_OVERLAPPINGOPTIONAL_OVERLAPPINGIND_CONT_FLOW_PRODUCTIONMIN_OVERLAP_TIME_UNITMIN_OVERLAP_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_OVERLAP_TIMEMIN_SEND_AHEAD_QTYIND_SPLITTING_REQRDMAX_NO_OF_SPLITSMIN_PROCESSING_TIME_UNITMIN_PROCESSING_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_PROCESSING_TIMEMAX_WAIT_TIME_UNITMAX_WAIT_TIME_UNIT_ISOMAX_WAIT_TIMEREQUIRED_WAIT_TIME_UNITREQUIRED_WAIT_TIME_UNIT_ISOREQUIRED_WAIT_TIMESTANDARD_QUEUE_TIME_UNITSTANDARD_QUEUE_TIME_UNIT_ISOSTANDARD_QUEUE_TIMEMIN_QUEUE_TIME_UNITMIN_QUEUE_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_QUEUE_TIMESTANDARD_MOVE_TIME_UNITSTANDARD_MOVE_TIME_UNIT_ISOSTANDARD_MOVE_TIMEMIN_MOVE_TIME_UNITMIN_MOVE_TIME_UNIT_ISOMIN_MOVE_TIMETEARDOWN_AND_WAIT_INDREDUCTION_STRATEGYSORTED_BYVENDOR_NOPLND_DELRYINFO_REC_NET_PRICEPRICE_UNITCOST_ELEMCURRENCYCURRENCY_ISOINFO_RECPURCH_ORGPURCH_GROUPFIXED_LOT_EXT_PROCESS_INDMATL_GROUPUSERFIELDS_KEYWORD_IDUSERFIELD_CH20_00USERFIELD_CH20_01USERFIELD_CH10_02USERFIELD_CH10_03USERFIELD_QUAN_04USERFIELD_UNIT_04USERFIELD_UNIT_04_ISOUSERFIELD_QUAN_05USERFIELD_UNIT_05USERFIELD_UNIT_05_ISOUSERFIELD_CURR_06USERFIELD_CURRENCY_06USERFIELD_CURRENCY_06_ISOUSERFIELD_CURR_07USERFIELD_CURRENCY_07USERFIELD_CURRENCY_07_ISOUSERFIELD_DATE_08USERFIELD_DATE_09USERFIELD_FLAG_10USERFIELD_FLAG_11COST_RELEVANTPO_NUMBERPO_ITEMCO_BUSPROCCUMULATION_TYPESUB_ACT_NOT_IN_ORDER_INDEXT_PROC_WITH_SUBCONTRACT_INDINSPTYPERECORDING_VIEWFREE_GRIDTIME_GRIDQUANT_GRIDQUANTONCETIME_UNITTIME_UNIT_ISOTIME_FACTORQTY_BTW_TWO_INSPECTIONSQUANT_UNITQUANT_UNIT_ISOSTOCK_RELATED_PARTIAL_LOT_ASSGINSP_POINT_COMPLT_FLOW_VARIANTGROUP_OPERATION
5000006110 20260113 99991231 10 PP01  FW_01PE01 TEST RUN1KG 115      10.000   51.000                                                                                                                      
5000006110 20260113 99991231 20 PP01  FW_01PE01 TEST RUN22KG 115      12.000   55.000

entry.title: How to use Custom Logic App to pass Contract Header data to Sales Order header?
entry.content:
I'm fairly new on with CleanCore approach. 

For passing the data of Contract Header into Call off Sales Order header, which extension point will be used? is SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD correct? I am trying to pass the values of some standard and custom fields.

entry.title: Sap upgrade
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

​We are currently planning an SAP system upgrade and are discussing the landscape sequence. I have two specific questions regarding the methodology:

• ​System Independence: While I understand that DEV, QA, and PRD are upgraded individually, is it technically feasible (or advisable) to run them as completely independent projects with significant time gaps between them?

• ​Reverse Sequence Risks: What are the specific technical consequences if we were to upgrade the Development (DEV) system last? Specifically, I am concerned about: 

• ​Handling SPDD/SPAU adjustments and how those would be transported if PRD is already upgraded.

• ​The impact on the transport directory and version mismatch errors (RC=8/12) when moving emergency fixes from a lower-version DEV to a higher-version PRD.

• ​Maintenance of custom code (Z-programs) during the "split-version" period.

​Has anyone ever been forced into this "Reverse Sequence" due to business constraints? If so, how did you manage the landscape synchronization, or did you ultimately decide it was too high-risk?

​Looking forward to your insights and any "lessons learned" from the field.

entry.title: CDS view for accessing customer group(sales area) in a customer master
entry.content:
I want to know the CDS view which can return me the customer group inside a BADI:_SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE  based on customer as an input

Please advice

#CDS

entry.title: SmartForm Recovery – Request for Assistance
entry.content:
We recently made some changes to the SmartForm, and those changes have been transported to the PRD system. However, the client is now requesting the previous format.

Could you please let us know if it is possible to recover or restore the earlier version of the SmartForm?

I also attempted to re-import the old transport request from DEV to QA, but the previous changes were not reflected.
May I kindly request you to prioritize this and provide a solution as soon as possible.
Regards,
Jayachitra.

entry.title: Production Order Confirmation Posts Successfully but GI 261 Is Not Created via EML.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

We are using EML on I_ProductionOrdConfirmationTP to post a production order confirmation together with goods movement data through the child entity _ProdnOrdConfMatlDocItm. The confirmation is created successfully, but the 261 Goods Issue (MIGO equivalent) is not posted, and no backend error is returned.

Has anyone faced this situation where the confirmation BO processes correctly but does not generate the expected GI 261? Is there any specific prerequisite or RAP BO limitation that prevents the 261 movement from being created in this scenario?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM Custom logic not working for changing delivery quantity (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We need to use LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM  logic to change item quantity at delivery bu when we implemented the logic it change the data at backend and cds views but at the screen G_LFIMG value stands constant. 

We implemented custom logic as below: 

 

After we created the delivery quantity still seen as 3 at main screen 

Bu at picking tab of item LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM worked and changed quantity to 1 

Even in the cds views values are changed to 1 but still G_LFIMG field seems as 3 

 

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Released CDS View for Sales Price Condition Records with Material ID, in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

We are building an external OData API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
Our goal is to merge Sales Pricing data with Inventory (Material Stock)
data into a single API for downstream consumption.

GOAL:
Expose a combined Stock + Sales Price API by joining:
- I_MaterialStock_2 (inventory/stock levels per plant & storage location)
- A Sales Price CDS view (with Material ID as the join key)

PROBLEM:
The only relevant released CDS view we found is I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
— but it does NOT include the Material / Product field.
Without Material ID, we cannot join pricing data with stock data
at the material level.

ALREADY CHECKED:
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord — no Material ID field
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecordValidity — Material ID not consistently exposed
- SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com) — no suitable released OData service found
- SAP Help Portal and SAP Notes — no workaround found

DESIRED API DATA MODEL (illustrative):

SELECT
s.Material,
s.Plant,
s.StorageLocation,
s.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit AS StockQuantity,
p.ConditionRateValue AS SalesPrice,
p.TransactionCurrency,
p.ConditionValidityEndDate
FROM I_MaterialStock_2 AS s
JOIN <Missing Sales Price CDS> AS p ON s.Material = p.Material

REQUIRED FIELDS from the missing Sales Price CDS view:
- Material / Product (mandatory join key)
- ConditionType (e.g. PR00)
- ConditionRateValue (price amount)
- TransactionCurrency
- SalesOrganization / DistributionChannel (for filtering)
- ConditionValidityStartDate / ConditionValidityEndDate

QUESTIONS:
1. Does a released CDS view exist that exposes Sales Price
Condition Records WITH Material ID?
2. If not, is SAP planning to release one  and when?
3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to join I_MaterialStock_2
with Sales Price data for an external-facing OData API?
4. If a custom approach is needed, is RAP/BTP extensibility
the right pattern within S/4HANA Cloud boundaries?

We have exhausted all self-service options before posting here.
Any guidance from the community or SAP experts is greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

Rudhra

entry.title: Updating Production Order Component Quantity as per Batch from Custom App to SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with Custom Application (using RAP Application) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are created with fields such as Batch, Quantity, Unit of measurement , Plant, Material, Storage Location, Backflush Indicator, Material Category, & Sequence Category.

Our requirement is to update these line items in the Component tab of the Production Order in the standard SAP Public Cloud system.

In other words, each Batch wise line item created in the Custom Application should get populated in a corresponding component tab in the Production Order.

We explored the CDS view I_ProductionOrderOpComponentTP, but as it is not a root view, we are unable to perform transactional updates using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) for transactional updates.

Below is the field mapping for reference

 

CDS View FieldCustom App Field
RequiredQuantityQuantity
BaseUnitUOM
BatchBatch
PlantPlant
MaterialProduct
BillOfMaterialItemNumberLine Item Number
StorageLocationMRM1'
MatlCompIsMarkedForBackflush'X'
BillOfMaterialItemCategoryL'
SequenceCategory                          '0'


We would like to know if there is any available BAdI, API, or transactional CDS view that can be used to achieve this requirement.

Best Regards,

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Enable Translations for RAP-based Fiori Apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created a Fiori application using the RAP Generator and deployed it in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Now, I’m trying to maintain translations (for example, Italian) so that the app UI, labels, and catalog texts adapt based on the user’s logon language.

Could anyone guide me on the recommended way to handle translations for RAP-based Fiori apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any insights, best practices, or documentation references would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: EML Create Business Partner Problem - The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3 In SAP S4Hana Public Cloud.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Sucess.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.


Any guidance on why the entity is not created despite no reported errors would be appreciated.

Best regards

entry.title: Business Partner Not Created via EML – The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
We are trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

 

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Socio de negocio creado correctamente.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: How do l implement a user exit or badi to retrigger release strategy when price or quantity decrease
entry.content: I have been tasked to implement a user exit to retrigger PO release strategy when there is a net price, quantity or net value increase or decrease.  How do l implement a user exit or badi to retrigger release strategy since sap only retriggers when there is an increase only. I have implemented user exit EXIT_SAPLEBND_002 but it turns out some orders are retriggering and some orders are not so l need some help
